title: sisymbrium amphibium subsp. terrestre
intro: Sisymbrium amphibium subsp. terrestre, also known as terrestrial watercress, is a subspecies of the watercress plant that grows in a terrestrial environment. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of terrestrial watercress include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
